overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character moves from a covered walkway through commercial streets lined with palm trees and holographic advertisements, turning into narrower industrial streets before reaching an open intersection with a colorful elevated overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway transitioning to open street

events.description: exiting covered walkway into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, moving from shadow into sunlight

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: concrete overpass covering the initial section of the walkway
tall building under construction with scaffolding and green netting
large digital advertisements mounted on the building facade
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete covered walkway with mixed lighting. As the character moves forward, they exit the covered area around the 5-second mark into bright midday sunlight, revealing palm trees and a large construction site ahead. Sparse pedestrians walk along the wide commercial sidewalk.

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk past various commercial storefronts and neon signs

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright pink and purple neon sign for 'Jacked and Coke' establishment
large concrete planters with tropical vegetation outside shops
modern street lamps with horizontal light bars

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sunlit commercial sidewalk, the character passes vibrant neon signs including a prominent 'Jacked and Coke' establishment. Palm trees line the left side while the large construction building remains visible ahead. Pedestrians walk in both directions along the wide pedestrian path.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial side street with overhead walkways

events.description: character turns left at the intersection into a narrower side street
transition from commercial main street to industrial side street with green buildings

agents.ego_description: turning left at the corner and proceeding down a narrower street with industrial architecture

notable_agents.action: person in white outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall industrial building with green facade and red trim
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
metal scaffolding and construction equipment on the right building
cars parked along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrower industrial side street characterized by a distinctive green building on the left and metal scaffolding on the right. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the street ahead. The environment shifts from commercial neon to industrial utilitarian architecture as the character continues walking.

events.description: character crosses the street at the intersection, moving through crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and entering the open plaza area beneath the colorful overpass

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large elevated highway support with bright yellow and green structural elements
yellow industrial building with 'Wicked Tires' signage
massive holographic advertisement screen mounted on building
dark tunnel entrance beneath the elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the side street into a wide open intersection dominated by a massive colorful overpass structure with yellow and green supports. After crossing the street, the scene opens into a plaza area with a 'Wicked Tires' building visible and a dark underpass tunnel ahead. The crowd density increases slightly as pedestrians move through the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded urban walkway into a bright commercial district and finally through a utilitarian industrial zone. It begins under a concrete covered walkway with mixed lighting before emerging into bright midday sunlight, revealing a wide sidewalk lined with palm trees and a large construction site. As the character moves forward, the scene passes vibrant neon signs and the Jacked and Coke establishment, maintaining a bright, open atmosphere. The camera then turns left, shifting from the commercial neon aesthetic to a narrower industrial side street characterized by a green building, metal scaffolding, and an overhead pedestrian bridge. Finally, the path opens into a wide intersection dominated by a massive colorful overpass with yellow and green supports, leading toward a plaza with a Wicked Tires building and a dark underpass tunnel.
